world.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
world.summary: US President Donald Trump has announced that a deal between the US and Iran will be signed on Sunday, despite Tehran casting doubt on the timing. The deal aims to ease tensions between the two countries and prevent further conflict. The move comes as Iran's President Hassan Rouhani has expressed skepticism about the deal, citing concerns over its terms and the US's commitment to it.

world.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
world.summary: Swiss voters have rejected a proposal to cap the country's population at 10 million, with early projections suggesting that 55% of participants voted against the proposal. The proposal was put forward by the Swiss People's Party, which argued that the country's population was growing too quickly and putting pressure on infrastructure and resources.

world.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
world.summary: Russian families are using AI technology to create digital 'resurrections' of loved ones killed in Ukraine, in a highly controversial trend that lies at the intersection of Russia's war on Ukraine, new AI technologies, and grief. The technology uses AI algorithms to create digital avatars of the deceased, which can be used to communicate with family members and friends.

tech.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
tech.summary: The suspension of access to new AI models by Anthropic has sparked a debate in India about the country's AI future. Tech leaders are discussing whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India's AI ambitions, and whether the country should prioritize developing its own AI capabilities or rely on foreign companies.

tech.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
tech.summary: Meta is reportedly moving to unwind its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal to be reversed. The move comes as Meta faces increasing scrutiny from Chinese authorities over its business practices and data handling.

tech.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
tech.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday. The move comes as Anthropic faces increasing scrutiny from governments and regulators over its AI models and data handling.

sports.title: New York Knicks win NBA championship for first time in over 50 years
sports.summary: The New York Knicks have won the NBA championship for the first time in over 50 years, defeating the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 in the fifth game of the best-of-seven series. The win marks a historic moment for the Knicks and their fans, who have been waiting for decades for a championship.

sports.title: Μουντιάλ 2026: Μετά την κλοπή η Αγγλία αντιμέτωπη και με ανεμοστρόβιλο
sports.summary: England is facing a new challenge at the 2026 World Cup, as a tornado warning has been issued for Kansas City. The team is already dealing with the aftermath of a recent theft, and now they must contend with the threat of severe weather.

sports.title: Κουζμίνσκας για την κατάκτηση του τίτλου από τους Νικς: «Περήφανος που δεν έκανα τίποτα απολύτως γι' αυτό το πρωτάθλημα»
sports.summary: Mindaugas Kuzminskas has spoken about the New York Knicks' championship win, saying he is proud of the team's achievement despite not doing much to contribute to it. The Knicks' victory marks a historic moment for the team and their fans.

denmark.title: Tidligere minister Torsten Schack Pedersen stopper i politik efter 21 år
denmark.summary: Former Danish Minister Torsten Schack Pedersen has announced that he will be leaving politics after 21 years. The move comes as a surprise to many, and raises questions about the future of Danish politics.

denmark.title: Hærværk og flere anholdt under fejring af Knicks-sejr i New York
denmark.summary: There have been reports of vandalism and arrests in New York City as fans celebrate the New York Knicks' championship win. The incident highlights the excitement and enthusiasm of the fans, but also raises concerns about public safety.

greece.title: Αγώνες πολεμικών τεχνών στον Λευκό Οίκο: Πρωτοφανές αθλητικό θέαμα με φόντο τα γενέθλια Τραμπ και αντιδράσεις για το κόστος
greece.summary: A unique martial arts event was held at the White House, coinciding with Donald Trump's birthday. The event sparked controversy over its cost and the use of the White House as a venue.

greece.title: Χαλάνδρι: «Η παραγωγή σκευασμάτων γινόταν σύμφωνα με ιατρικές συνταγές» ισχυρίστηκε ο φαρμακοποιός
greece.summary: A pharmacist in Chalandri has claimed that the production of substances was carried out in accordance with medical prescriptions. The statement raises questions about the legitimacy of the pharmacist's actions.
